tools.name: list_faq_guides
tools.title: List FAQ guides
tools.description: List every public FAQ / resume guide published on ResuVibe. Returns slug, title, category, short description, and canonical URL for each guide.

tools.name: get_faq_guide
tools.title: Get FAQ guide
tools.description: Fetch the full contents of one public ResuVibe FAQ / resume guide by its slug. Returns title, category, canonical URL, and all section headings and HTML bodies.

slug.description: Guide slug, e.g. 'account-executive'. Use list_faq_guides to discover available slugs.

tools.name: search_faq
tools.title: Search FAQ guides
tools.description: Case-insensitive substring search across ResuVibe's public FAQ / resume guides. Matches on title, slug, category, and description. Returns summaries; call get_faq_guide for full contents.
